_for: TheBridge leg 8 (ECO / echo templates) — literature cross-check of the inter-echo spacing

formula.name: Kerr-tortoise echo round-trip (Abedi-Dvali Planck-proximity wall)
formula.reference: Abedi, Dvali, et al. 2017, arXiv:1612.00266, Eq.2 / Table I; Cardoso & Pani reviews
formula.expression: dt_echo = 2[r*(r_peak) - r*(r_mem)],  r*(r) = r + cp·ln(r-r+) - cm·ln(r-r-),  cp = 2M·r+/(r+-r-), cm = 2M·r-/(r+-r-);  r± = M(1±√(1-χ²)), a = χM, r_peak = 3M (photon sphere);  membrane r_mem = r+ + δ with δ = (n·ℓ_P)²(r+-r-)/(4(r+²+a²)) [proper distance n·ℓ_P above r+]

validation_summary.claim: uncalibrated first-principles formula reproduces Abedi 2017 Table I to <2% (>98% agreement) on all 3 published events; the same closed form is applied to GW250114 (post-2017).
